title: Start Making
description: Mod-pak which will help in the creation of maps, datapaks. This mod-pack contains useful and optimized mods. This mod-pack in alpha version.
body:
# Description
**Start Making** is unique mod-pack created to simplify the process of developing maps and datapacks in Minecraft, as well as partially resource packs. It includes a number of powerful tools and mods to help you focus on your creativity and quickly create interesting content.
#### Why Start Making is worth downloading.
This mod pack offers unique tools that greatly simplify content creation in Minecraft. If you want to focus on creativity and quickly develop maps and datapacks, “Start Making” is the perfect solution for you.
## Main Functions:

1. There is a menu with web generators and one built-in one
2. In the inventory there are Advanced World Settings, there you can prescribe Waypoint, Script from commands, Import scorbords and game rules.
3. Notes in which you can write your plans for the day or tips as notes appear in pause and many other menus (selected randomly).
4. In the worlds menu there is a button to select the folder where the worlds are saved.
5. Textures of the game you can change in the game itself!
6. There is an error display datapacks
7. There is a template datapack and resource-pack
8. There is a menu where you can write your nickname (From Modrinth,CurseForge,PlanetMinecraft) or insert a link click on the button to open the site.
9. In Axiom added different blueprints,brush scripts,schematics.
10. Mod-pack is well optimized.

## Your help is important!
You can contribute to the development of the mod-pak! Just follow the [LINK](https://github.com/Zoor-Github/Start-Making-Modpack/issues) to suggest your datapaсk or ideas that could be useful for the community.
## How can I report a problem?
Write to [LINK](https://github.com/Zoor-Github/Start-Making-Modpack/issues) but first see if the problem is solved.

![see you soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48535134c0bc6383eff0e50fe409eff41c64f0f8.png)
